title: collinsia heterophylla var. austromontana
intro: Collinsia heterophylla var. austromontana, commonly known as the blue eyed Mary or collinsia, is a plant species native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. It belongs to the plantain family (Plantaginaceae) and is a perennial herb with blue and white flowers. The medicinal properties of Collinsia heterophylla var. austromontana include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote respiratory health, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use.
